Container.Name: pokefolio
Container.Overview: Pokéfolio is a self-hosted Pokémon TCG portfolio: collection, binders, wishlist, custom cards, price tracking via TCGdex and the Cardmarket bulk catalog. Runs as a single Next.js container backed by an embedded SQLite database — everything stays on your Unraid box.
Container.Description: Pokéfolio is a self-hosted Pokémon TCG portfolio app.[br][br] [b]Features:[/b][br] • Collection, binders, wishlist mit Mengen, Zustand, Variante, Sprache[br] • TCGdex-Integration für Karten-Metadaten und Bilder (DE/EN/FR/ES/IT/PT/JA Fallback)[br] • Cardmarket-Bulk-Katalog mit täglichem Preis-Guide — keine Scraping-API nötig[br] • Custom Cards für Promo / Inserts mit eigenem Bild-Upload[br] • TCGdex-Bildsuche per Set+Nr. oder per Name in allen Sprachen[br] • Portfolio-Kursverlauf mit historischen Snapshots[br] • Mobile-/iPhone-Webclip-tauglich, dunkles UI[br] • Backup + Restore der gesamten Datenbank aus den Einstellungen heraus[br][br] [b]Default Port:[/b] 3000[br] [b]Default User/Group:[/b] 99:100 (nobody:users)[br] [b]Storage:[/b][br] • /app/data — SQLite-Datenbank (pokefolio.db)[br] • /app/public/uploads — eigene Karten-Bilder

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port of the Next.js server

Config.Name: Uploads Directory
Config.Description: User-uploaded custom card images, served at /uploads/*

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID inside the container (99 = nobody)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID inside the container (100 = users)

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: Prisma connection string. Must point at a writable path inside the Database volume.

Config.Name: Primary TCGdex Language
Config.Description: Two-letter language code for the primary TCGdex sync (de/en/fr/es/it/pt/ja).
